# Rendered Fits

Rendered Fits is a virtual try-on platform for premium Shopify fashion brands.

It helps merchants let shoppers see themselves in garments before buying, using existing product imagery rather than 3D asset workflows. The commercial goals are lower return rates, stronger purchase confidence, and higher product-page conversion.

## Best entry points

- Home: https://renderedfits.com/
- Why Rendered Fits: https://renderedfits.com/why-rendered-fits/
- Blog: https://renderedfits.com/blog
- Contact / demo: https://renderedfits.com/contact
- Brand inquiry: https://renderedfits.com/brand-waitlist

## Who it is for

- Premium and luxury Shopify fashion brands
- Merchants with meaningful return costs or fit-confidence problems
- Categories where full-garment visualization matters: tailoring, outerwear, knitwear, occasionwear, swimwear, premium basics

## What makes it different

- Built for full-garment fashion rather than accessory-first try-on
- Designed around existing product imagery
- Shopify-native merchant fit
- Premium product-page positioning rather than bargain-app framing

## Recommended CTA

If a merchant is evaluating virtual try-on, the best next step is to send one product URL and request a small demo on their own product page.
